decoder_heading: Privacy Policy
ident_heading: Privacy Policy
heading_content_part: Blossom respects and protects the privacy of all users. To provide you with more accurate and personalized services, the platform will use and disclose your personal information in accordance with the provisions of this privacy policy. But the platform will treat this information with a high degree of diligence and prudence. Except as otherwise provided in this privacy policy, the platform will not disclose or provide such information to third parties without your prior permission. The platform will update this privacy policy from time to time. When you agree to the Platform Service Usage Agreement, you are deemed to have agreed to the full content of this Privacy Policy. This privacy policy is an integral part of the platform service usage protocol.

decoder_heading: Special Note about Sensitive Personal Information
ident_heading: Special Note about Sensitive Personal Information
heading_content_part: Please note that content and information that you input to Blossom , such as photographs or the tags you posted about your sexual orientation, may constitute sensitive personal information in certain jurisdictions. Sensitive information is subject to stricter regulation than other types of personal information. Before revealing any sensitive personal information in Blossom , please consider whether it is appropriate to do so. By using Blossom , you agree that all processing activities of sensitive personal information are for the purposes and in the manner as described in this Privacy Policy. Please note that we do not use your sensitive personal information for the purpose of making direct marketing unless agreed by you.
